programme.title: Star Trek: Lower Decks: Second Contact

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Diversity in the Workplace
programme.desc: Diversity and inclusion in the workplace.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Life During Wartime
programme.desc: To help Bailey become the best general surgeon at Seattle Grace, the Chief gives her new responsibility along with the challenge of removing a young girl's inoperable tumour,.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Rise Up
programme.desc: The Chief announces that a solo surgery will be awarded sending the residents into a competitive frenzy; Derek turns to Bailey for advice and Erica discovers a shocking connection between one of her surgical residents and a long-time patient.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A blood feud within a refugee family from Kosovo results in another victim, forcing Brenda and her team, along with Captain Raydor, to continue their investigation on Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Closer: An Ugly Game
programme.desc: The routine arrest of a crack addict exposes a questionable rehab facility and leads Brenda and her squad on a race to find a missing young woman. The case leads Fritz to reveal to Brenda some ugly truths about her past.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Flight Risk
programme.desc: When a father and his two young children go missing, the squad has to work quickly to find them, while uncovering a slew of terrible family secrets along the way. Meanwhile, Raydor does her best to trust Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Personal Day
programme.desc: Shorty after being released from prison, a man who proclaimed his innocence is found murdered. The victim's case is reopened and the squad works hard to solve a 17-year old murder. Meanwhile, Rusty confesses the reason behind his suspicious activity.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The division works to solve the murder of a dog that was left a $20-million estate by his deceased owner. With the help of a wannabe detective, the case takes a new turn as the squad suspect foul play in the death of the dog's owner, a wealthy heiress.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Letting It Go
programme.desc: The violent murder of an alleged rapist gives the squad the emotional task of questioning possible suspects. Meanwhile, Rusty begins to question his mother's motives as he catches her in a lie.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Body in the Bathtub
programme.desc: Fresno mattress factory manager James Blanco worked to provide the American Dream for his employees, but when he's gunned down in the shower investigators must find out if he was betrayed by a disgruntled worker.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Lies, Cameras and Lingerie
programme.desc: When the entrepreneurial spirit turns two best friends into mortal enemies, one woman goes on the run.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Triple Repo Trickery
programme.desc: Mike is on a mission in California's Central Valley, Ken and Danny do a triple repo, and Kevin is at the hands of a machine.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Custom Meat Processor
programme.desc: Mike heads to a dump to learn a seagull removing method. Then he's off to work on a mobile meat processing truck.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Horse Tester
programme.desc: Mike travels to Kentucky Equine Research Facility to assist with testing athletic horses. His duties include helping with blood testing during a fitness test and checking pH levels in fresh poo.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Detective
programme.desc: Mike joins the team at Purdue University's DECOMP Forensic Entomology Lab as they dig through pig carcasses searching for maggots and other insects.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Lightning Rod Installer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Lucedale, Mississippi to try his hand at installing a lightning rod system on a home.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Michael's Journey
programme.desc: A lifetime of abuse and ridicule has left Michael anxious and afraid to leave the house. Now with the help of his devoted wife he must follow Dr. Now's program to keep from eating himself to death.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Shannon's Journey
programme.desc: Shannon's husband loves her the way she is, but that may not help because she's 700 pounds and bedridden. Dr. Now knows it's not easy to break a toxic cycle of overfeeding and enabling.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Sixth Toe Surprise
programme.desc: Troy's extra toe causes him pain, and he hopes Dr. Ebonie can provide him with relief. Dr. Brad does his best to untangle a ballet dancer's twisted feet. Ramon turns to Dr. Ebonie for help with the massive sacks of fluid hanging from his leg and ankle.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer: Transformed
programme.desc: Mayra Rosales was one of the heaviest women in the world, embattled in one of the most publicized murder trials in history. Since her acquittal, she has begun a long journey: countless surgeries and hours of physical therapy for her second chance at life.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Forgive Me, Carmela
programme.desc: Jeremiah makes a desperate plea for Carmela to return. Dawn and Shelly go full English. Lowell must make a difficult call to his Mennonite parents. Mary takes a risk that could threaten her standing in the Amish community. Sabrina says good-bye.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Quint in Crisis
programme.desc: When Hazel undergoes eye surgery, Adam and Danielle must anxiously wait to find out if it was a success. Meanwhile at home, life is chaotic as usual as Blayke prepares for kindergarten and Mimi officially moves in.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quint-fluenza
programme.desc: When Danielle catches the flu, Mimi struggles to take care of five babies on her own. Adam plans a 10-year anniversary surprise for Danielle. And later, when Danielle gives a speech for the hospital, she faces the painful past of having premature babies.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn the Peacemaker
programme.desc: Mariah and Audrey are in town and share an exciting announcement with the family. Robyn tries to help Kody patch things up with Meri after their big fight on the property, but Kody pushes back and doesn't seem interested in fixing things.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Little and Looking for Love
programme.desc: TLC presents an intimate portrait of 19-year-old primordial dwarf Hannah, who faces ordinary challenges with an extraordinary condition. As she journeys through the tumultuous and sometimes heart-breaking rites of adolescence, her resilience is inspiring.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: My Deadly Appetite
programme.desc: Born with Prader Willi, a rare incurable syndrome, Will feels starved constantly and has bouts of physical aggression. At 280lbs and kicked out of school, an intense inpatient treatment program hundreds of miles from home may be his only hope.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXLII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn about babies getting milk drunk, make a few evasive maneuvers, and also remind us to click it or ticket.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dr. Drew Pinsky
programme.desc: TV personality and Loveline legend, Dr. Drew Pinsky and Rob take a look at some wild people and wonder 'What Went Wrong?' Check out some strong seniors flex their 'Grey Guns.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo get the phone insurance for some 'screen cracker', celebrate our differences with 'two types of people', and check out some clips that make them wonder 'maybe I'm the crazy one?'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bare Bones
programme.desc: A man brings in a collection of Mazon Creek fossils that are hundreds of millions of years old. The Pawn Stars stumble across a Down and Dirty custom motorcycle frame.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 1934 Rickenbacher 'frying pan' guitar and a document signed by John Hancock turn up at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Jet Setters
programme.desc: A guy brings in a Wesson over and under pistol; a 19th century pocket watch winds into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lost in Spacelander
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out a lap desk made by Dr. Samuel Mudd while he was imprisoned for his role in Lincoln's assassination. Then, a 1959 Bowden Spacelander bicycle pedals into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Break on Through
programme.desc: A painted bedroom door from the childhood home of The Doors' Jim Morrison lands in the shop. Then, Chumlee checks out a 1988 Zelda board game. Later, Corey gets a lead on a rare, and perfectly restored, collection of Indian motorcycles.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rocky Road
programme.desc: Handprints signed by Sylvester Stallone come into the shop. Then, Rick scouts out two signed Norman Rockwell lithographs. Later, Chumlee tries to prove he is more active than everyone thinks he is by entering an arm-wrestling competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawntucky Derby
programme.desc: A 1980s Sigma Derby horse-racing game, a 1940s Moby Dick Classic Comic, a dollar signed by Walt Disney and Ronald Reagan, and a 1910 envelope sealer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gilded Pawn Age
programme.desc: Rick visits a Gilded Age train and contemplates its purchase. A classic Nintendo racing game drives into the shop. A phenomenal Superman and Batman print has the team intrigued.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: A Brown Bess musket makes its way into the shop, and Rick hopes to hit the target with a deal. Then, Rick holds a piece of United States history when someone brings in Thomas Jefferson's personal copy of Jay's Treaty.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Crown Pawn
programme.desc: Corey bets it all on an original Triple Crown Trophy; let's see if he can win this horse race. Next the guys call in Rick Dale to save what might be one of the very first rides from Coney Island.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnsplosion
programme.desc: Rick gets the opportunity to drive a WWII tank. Afterwards, a Triplet Bicycle and toy soldiers march into the shop, and Chum finds a flamethrower.

programme.title: Swamp People: One Man Army
programme.desc: Troy makes an urgent plea to his armada to fill more tags, while Jacob and Don fish the waters of West Grand Lake for the biggest bull gators. Meanwhile, the Edwards go on a mission to catch the Moby Monster.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: The Sickness
programme.desc: Sue always dreamed of her own little quiet piece of paradise, but her dreams go up in smoke when a sinister guest comes knocking on August 27, 2001.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Rumors in the Halls
programme.desc: Suspicion lands close to home when 17-year-old prom queen Aquilla Flood is found dead in her bedroom. Her family faces tough questions, while Aquilla's friends point detectives to three young men.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: Shattered: Cowboy Killer
programme.desc: 2001. An 11-year-old girl makes a gruesome discovery in her own home.. a woman desperate to reach her mother has a sickening feeling something horrible has happened... and a homicide detective is assigned a murder case that will rattle her to her core.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: I Am Vanessa
programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: I Am Vanessa
programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: I Am Vanessa
programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative

programme.title: Shattered: Cowboy Killer
programme.desc: 2001. An 11-year-old girl makes a gruesome discovery in her own home.. a woman desperate to reach her mother has a sickening feeling something horrible has happened... and a homicide detective is assigned a murder case that will rattle her to her core.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The Mall Killings
programme.desc: Not all killers prowl lonely places. In Florida there is one killer who hunts where many of us go every day. In March and December 2007 two women were shot dead as they left the same shopping mall.

programme.title: Dark Minds: Blonde, Blue-Eyed and Gone
programme.desc: Four young girls go missing in Massachusetts and Connecticut. Some turn up dead, some are never seen again. They all have one thing in common: blond hair and blue eyes. But are they connected in another way? Are they victims of the same serial killer?

programme.title: Evil Kin: She Was A Good One
programme.desc: Dolores and Maria Ross grow up in a bitter sibling rivalry that escalates out of control when the family moves to Las Vegas. As their toxic feud spreads to the next generation, the storm will end in bloodshed. The question is, who finally snapped?

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: As Bad as It Gets
programme.desc: 41-year old Carol Krizan seems like the perfect match for downhearted divorcee, Roy Joe McCaleb. But when Roy is killed in his bed by an alleged prowler and Carol walks away scot-free, Roy’s family thinks she may have something to do with his murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Friends to the End
programme.desc: A close-knit group of co-workers are devastated when one of their own is found dead near a soccer field at the edge of their quiet Indiana town.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Crippling Desire
programme.desc: A home health care nurse falls in love with her married, wheelchair-bound patient. Once the secret gets out, someone has to die.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Blood Money
programme.desc: After two-long lost brothers connect as young adults, a dark disturbance emerges within the newly blended family unit.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When police discover Betty Sue Short murdered in her home, they notice disturbing similarities with another recent killing in the community of Kingsport, Tennessee.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Home Alone: A Mother and a Maniac
programme.desc: On the night of May 10, 2017, Haley McHam decides to leave her abusive partner Jamie. But when Jamie shows up the next day, nobody could have predicted the tragic home invasion that will leave Haley pleading for her life.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: In 2014, 57-year-old Nancy Pfister was discovered beaten to death in her closet in her Aspen, CO home. When items of Nancy's were found, including the key to the closet where her body was found, investigators zeroed in on who was responsible.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Weaponology: Israeli Commandos
programme.desc: Israeli Commandos are the most battle hardened military elite in the world. There's a commando unit for every type of mission, from hostage rescue to pre-emptive strike, all practiced to the point of perfection.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Scrap Wood Basement
programme.desc: Nicole takes on a basement restoration in order to help out a sick friend and does her best to use as much scrap wood and materials as she possible can.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fire Damage Fixes
programme.desc: Nicole heads to her hometown of Detroit, Michigan to save a 1920s home that has been vacant since a fire in the house next door left it severely damaged.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cracked Pipe Kitchen
programme.desc: Work continues on Nicole's project in her hometown of Detroit. Fire damage isn't the only thing causing problems: the main plumbing stack has a huge crack in it - causing years of water damage that has the walls crumbling at the touch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Roger Mooking bites down on the 15 best crunchy, crispy and crackling dishes. Nachos, pizzas, fried chicken, tacos and desserts are represented. Chefs offer recipes and tips on making the crispiest skin, the crunchiest chips and the most-crumbly crusts.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: It's Pony: Game Horse/ Unicorn
programme.desc: Annie and Pony use their video game skills to save their endangered friends. Then, Pony thinks he's become a unicorn, so Annie uses him to raise money to save their sports court.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Clark Laser/ Married to the Mom
programme.desc: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Odd Squad/ For Emergencies Only
programme.desc: Timmy watches his favorite show about a talking car and wishes he had his own talking car.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Good Ol' Days/ Future Lost
programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Planet of the Jellyfish
programme.desc: When an evil Jellien overlord replaces everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones, it's up to SpongeBob and Sandy to defeat him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: What's Eating Patrick/ Sanctuary
programme.desc: To defend Bikini Bottom's honour, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition. When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Tim Visible/ That Ol' Black Magic
programme.desc: Timmy's shot at the attendance award at school is threatened by a pounding from Francis.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Foul Balled/ The Boy Who Would Be Queen
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are useless, as they have switched genders in this wish mix.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Two and a Half Babies/ Dust Busters
programme.desc: Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man. Timmy must get Chet back in order to save the city. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: When L.O.S.E.R.S. Attack
programme.desc: Timmy's enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Beginning
programme.desc: Centuries ago, fairy ancestors hid a mystical wand on Earth that has the power to defeat The Darkness, but only the Chosen One depicted in the Fairy World prophecy can unlock its mysteries. Timmy gets chosen for the task, as he resembles the prophecy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy gives Mom and Dad superpowers; Timmy wishes he could go to the real Middle Ages.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turning Into Turner/ The Wand That Got Away
programme.desc: Using Timmy's DNA, Crocker pretends to be Timmy from the future. Cosmo loses his wand and Timmy and the gang must help find it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part
programme.desc: Timmy learns that to truly defeat The Darkness, he needs a second wand, which is located on the far side of the universe. The threat from the robotic Eliminators still remains as they have stolen Yugopotamia's Fake-i-fier technology.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chicken Poofs/ Stupid Cupid
programme.desc: Poof gets the chicken poofs and turns everyone into chickens; Timmy takes Cupid's arrows.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Final Ending
programme.desc: Timmy returns to Dimmsdale to find out that his home is actually an illusion, and he is now living inside The Darkness. Cosmo, Wanda and Jorgen come to the rescue, and Timmy learns he must also stop a rogue Eliminator who has absorbed his friend's wands.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Abra Catastrophe
programme.desc: It's the one year anniversary of Timmy having Cosmo and Wanda as his Godparents.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Jimmy/ Timmy Power Hour
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is magically sent to the secret lab of none other than Jimmy Neutron, the boy with the genius IQ.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Channel Chasers
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a magic remote control that will allow him to travel through television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: With F.O.W.L. at their heels, Scrooge tests out the Money Bin’s deadly new security system on Louie and Della, while Beakley and Webby train the others for an enemy attack.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Boss Battle Bonanza
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Slime and Pirates!
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Mirror/ Cricket's Tickets
programme.desc: When the Greens visit BigTech, Tilly jumps at the chance to test Gwendolyn Zapp's new technology, which promises to make them the "perfect family." Cricket wins tickets to a show and must decide whether to bring Tilly or Remy.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Swap Meet/ Bee Awesome
programme.desc: An extraordinary kid named Kick is determined to become the world's greatest daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Trash Talk/ Nerves of Steal
programme.desc: When Kick is caught littering, he is assigned highway clean-up duty, but finds keeping a stretch of highway litter-free more difficult than he thought when up against Chuck Glarman, a pesky rival who is determined to have the cleanest stretch.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dead Man's Drop/ Stumped
programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Crumbs!/ Stay Cool
programme.desc: Kick must keep Mom's cookies away from Dad, a relentless cookie-fiend.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Diary/ Sew What
programme.desc: Dad forces Kick and Brad to behave and stay out of each other's personal belongings.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Mellowbrook Drift/ Gift of Wacky
programme.desc: Kick challenges the physics nerd bully to a winner-takes-all, gravity-defying race.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Shining Ashindra!
programme.desc: With the addition of Delta, the Victories are training harder than ever before, in the hopes of taking Inferno down! Seeing how far Dante’s come, Arman fears he’s fallen behind.

programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: The Inspectors: Trial by Error
programme.desc: A construction company is receiving threatening letters for building on a site that is filled with old trees. Preston's pre-law class is having a mock trial, and he enlists Veronica and Noah to try to win.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help bring together an orphan boy and a wealthy couple.

programme.title: Heartland: The Heart of a River
programme.desc: Amy and Ty find themselves drawing closer as they make a desperate bid to save the wild horses. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter set aside their differences and form a united front against trumped up child endangerment charges.

programme.title: Heartland: The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Amy finds herself in a difficult position when a client reveals that Peter turned down a lucrative job offer in Calgary.

programme.title: Heartland: Broken Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy is invited to do a horse clinic in Montana, she and Ty decide to take a road trip together. An unexpected encounter derails their plans.

programme.title: Random Acts: Woodn't Believe Your Eyes
programme.desc: Will and Emilie surprise a man who has endured a life of struggle and pain by creating and finishing bedrooms for him and his two kids, who have never had their own rooms. Will, Jenna, and Mason help random strangers with annoying odd jobs.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries: The Gift of Connection
programme.desc: Liam meets a man who shares his same passion after trying sand boarding in Peru.

programme.title: My Perfect Family: Twins
programme.desc: For 28-year-old mom Nikki Stokes, life is a constant juggle with three other children to care for as well as non-verbal twins Maddie and Phoenix, who have high needs. We walk in her shoes to see how she navigates the daily grind.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Bear
programme.desc: Derrick needs to build a total of twelve devices to help three different animals.

programme.title: The Fixers: CRIT, Mexico
programme.desc: The Fixers fly to Tampico, Mexico to work at a rehabilitation center for children with neuromuscular issues. The center helps children learn to use wheelchairs and other adaptive equipment, but wheelchairs are difficult to get in Mexico.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Burgess Family
programme.desc: Makeovers are taking place both at the Burgess house and off-site with the Burgess Family. Check it out, and don't miss the special surprises we have in store.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: One of Meredith's oldest friends becomes an intern at Seattle Grace but Meredith's friends are less than welcoming. Lexie leads her fellow interns in secretive, unorthodox surgical training sessions and a new surgeon brings order to the OR.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: In the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Meredith, Cristina and Bailey come to Lexie and Sadie's rescue when a routine surgery goes horribly wrong. While Owen and Derek treat a man who was seriously injured during a sleepwalking episode, Mark comforts the sleepwalker's distraught daughter.

programme.title: The Closer: Unknown Trouble
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads the team to the owner of a music label; Brenda is sued.

programme.title: The Closer: Repeat Offender
programme.desc: Brenda and her team investigate the murder of a young girl who was house-sitting.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Letting It Go
programme.desc: The violent murder of an alleged rapist gives the squad the emotional task of questioning possible suspects. Meanwhile, Rusty begins to question his mother's motives as he catches her in a lie.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A foreigner is found murdered inside his hotel room. The squad must work quickly to find the killer while avoiding any international repercussions when a U.S. diplomat becomes involved in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jane Doe #38
programme.desc: After finding a young runaway murdered and thrown in a trash can, the Major Crimes unit is led on a long, puzzling hunt to find the deceased girl's killer and her identity. Meanwhile, Ryador consults her husband about a proposition she has for Rusty.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 65 Hours
programme.desc: On the morning that Jane is about to testify in a murder trial, she discovers that a key piece of evidence was stolen. BPD has three days to resolve the crime, or else the murderer may go free. Frankie learns a few magic tricks to impress Nina.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Hope
programme.desc: Doctors discover a shocking secret while treating a young mother who is dying of cancer.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Into Madness
programme.desc: An illness that is difficult to diagnose causes symptoms that resemble schizophrenia.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: One October: Massacre on the Strip
programme.desc: Stephen Paddock lived the lifestyle of the rich and famous in Las Vegas. Gambling up to $1M a day, he was known as a ‘whale.’ But a trip to Vegas in October, 2017 leaves 58 dead.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
