programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Woolen Mill Operator
programme.desc: Mike spends a day working at Ohio Valley Natural Fibers where he makes yarn from fleece. Then he goes to work at a day spa in Michigan where he helps wax hair off of his good friend Barsky.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pinsetter Mechanic
programme.desc: Mike travels to Fremont, CA, to help maintain a bowling centre. Then he responds to a letter from one of his fans who wants to see more footage of cameraman Doug.

programme.title: BattleBots: We're Beast Slayin' Tonight!
programme.desc: It's win-or-go-home time for 16 elite bots as we conclude the Round of 32.

programme.title: BattleBots: We're Beast Slayin' Tonight!
programme.desc: The Round of 32 rages on to its conclusion as second seed Bloodsport fights to continue its winning run toward the Giant Nut. Last year's runner-up Witch Doctor battles Skorpios.

programme.title: BattleBots: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: It's the penultimate episode of the season. Just 16 bots remain, and eight will die in the BattleBox tonight. For the victors, they'll be just two fights away from getting their hands on the most coveted trophy in robotic sport: The Giant Nut.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Desperado Tournament II
programme.desc: Eight bots on the brink go head-to-head in the last-chance Desperado tournament, and in one insane night, fighters on the edge of elimination take one final shot at redemption.

programme.title: BattleBots: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: It's the penultimate episode of the season. Just 16 bots remain, and eight will die in the BattleBox tonight. For the victors, they'll be just two fights away from getting their hands on the most coveted trophy in robotic sport: The Giant Nut.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Desperado Tournament II
programme.desc: Eight bots on the brink go head-to-head in the last-chance Desperado tournament, and in one insane night, fighters on the edge of elimination take one final shot at redemption.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dustin to the Rescue
programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Depths of Despair
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are close to a huge gold cleanup. Ryan faces his worst fears as he dives deeper than ever into a crumbling, narrow 14-foot hole. Carlos finally hits bedrock at Rockfall Ravine and reveals that this dive site could pay out huge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Ride or Die
programme.desc: With their richest site picked clean, Dustin and crew move upstream to 'The Chute' a promising, yet dangerous site with rapids stronger than ever. Fred and crew rethink their operation and adapt the rock drag method to a vertical lift system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: A Special Kind of Crazy
programme.desc: At his new dive site, The Chute, Dustin is overpowered by the raging white water leaving his life in his crew's hands. After heavy rain, Fred's crew fights zero visibility and have a deadly encounter 14 feet underwater.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Dustin risks the remainder of his season on an ambitious move upstream to raging waters, in a quest to add to his record breaking gold haul. After a brush with death, Fred must come up with a new plan before someone gets killed in their 20-foot dive hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Dustin's crew return to the deadly waters of The Chute and an exciting discovery ignites the crew to push past their limits. Fred's crew is dangerously deep at The Trifecta, and the pressure to get down to bedrock tests them all.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender
programme.desc: Dave's crew is hunting for better ground and behind on their gold target. To turn their season around, Dave calls on a mining legend for help searching for gold at the historic Birdseye mine in Montana.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Blue Room Bonanza
programme.desc: Chris makes an incredible discovery that sets the team up on the best gold all season. As winter starts to close in, Dave gets a hot tip that takes him 2,500 miles north to a mine where he pans the biggest nugget of his career.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs
programme.desc: Tammy's new doctor gives her what feels like an insurmountable weight goal, but it's not the only challenge she's facing. Amy and Michael drop a bomb that changes everything.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Michael's Journey
programme.desc: A lifetime of abuse and ridicule has left Michael anxious and afraid to leave the house. Now with the help of his devoted wife he must follow Dr. Now's program to keep from eating himself to death.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gideon's Story
programme.desc: At 650 pounds, Gideon's weight prohibits him from working, making him completely dependent on his exhausted wife. Desperate for change, he uproots his family to restart his life with weight-loss surgery and hopes for a future of happily-ever-after.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Michael's Journey
programme.desc: A lifetime of abuse and ridicule has left Michael anxious and afraid to leave the house. Now with the help of his devoted wife he must follow Dr. Now's program to keep from eating himself to death.

programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gideon's Story
programme.desc: At 650 pounds, Gideon's weight prohibits him from working, making him completely dependent on his exhausted wife. Desperate for change, he uproots his family to restart his life with weight-loss surgery and hopes for a future of happily-ever-after.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Stay Amish or Go English?
programme.desc: Jeremiah and Ada must decide the future of their donut stand business; Mary learns her fate with the Amish Church; Shelly meets her biological mother; Lowell finds out surprising news about his baby during an ultrasound; Dawn reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: This Little Quint Stays Home
programme.desc: Danielle and Adam explore sending the quints to nursery school, but when one of the them isn't allowed to go, the Busbys face the difficult decision of splitting the girls up. As for Mimi, living under the Busby roof has begun to take a serious toll.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Five Babies on a Budget
programme.desc: After Danielle confronts Adam about his money-spending ways, they realize they need to make some tough choices to provide for their six girls. They also continue to step up their efforts to get Hazel walking so she can join her sisters in pre-school.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Mystery Man
programme.desc: Micah reunites with model-friend Helena for a very hot and steamy modeling session. Barry and Isaac try to talk about the birds and the bees. Lydia reveals she has a secret crush, and Moriah goes on her first date ever.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: You Can't Stop the Girl
programme.desc: Ethan is left speechless after Olivia gets a body piercing. Ethan and Olivia host Micah and Moriah for their first ever Independence Day. Kim, Barry and the kids head back to the farm to welcome visitors from down under.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Open to Falling in Love
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia realize that in order to save their marriage and sanity, they need to move farther away from Kim and Barry. Moriah's relationship with Max is in jeopardy, and Micah faces financial stress after he wrecks his car on the eve of a hot date.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: A Year of Separation
programme.desc: Theresa adjusts as she and Larry get closer to divorce. A skeptic turns when his dad is channeled. Meet Theresa's mother for the first time and the family thinks Larry Jr will pop the question at a party for his girlfriend.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Readings and Renovations
programme.desc: Theresa unexpectedly reads one of the construction workers in her home. In a group reading, she changes the mind of a skeptic who lost his son in a car accident. Later, with Larry living in LA, Theresa tries to spend time with her family.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: An Accident on Tour
programme.desc: Theresa is sidelined after a severe accident. But she doesn't remain silent, conducting readings at her doctor's office and directly after surgery. Housebound, Theresa must open her home for group readings for the first time in years.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Paulie and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Snookie's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together and she finally feels like she is a part of the family. Meanwhile, Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: When Mike invites girls back to the house, the situation gets out of control, and Snooki gets into her second fight of the summer. Meanwhile Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Montanabama Shore

programme.desc: Lamar's insomnia begins to negatively affect Khloe. Malika breaks her biggest dating rule when she starts dating a guy with young children.

programme.title: Khloe & Lamar: Alone Star State of Mind

programme.title: Khloe & Lamar: Under Pressure

programme.title: Khloe & Lamar: Compulsive Behavior
programme.desc: Rob's OCD gets out of hand in Dallas after his living situation in LA becomes compromised. Malika is jealous of Khloe's friendship with fellow NBA wife, Porschla Kidd.

programme.title: Khloe & Lamar: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Khloe's family urges her to take a DNA test to put an end to the rumours about who her father is. Lamar finally expresses the painful emotions that have been holding him back.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Kris decides to pursue a DNA test to prove Khloe's paternity. Kourtney angers Kim when she takes over relocating DASH and Bruce goes to extremes to get the family's attention.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Momager Dearest
programme.desc: Kourt takes her grudge against Kris to a new level. Kim wants payback after Bruce forces her to overcome her fears and Kendall and Kylie start working for Seventeen Magazine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Everybody's Wigging Out
programme.desc: Rob hurts Bruce's feelings when he says he never had a male role model growing up. Kris' road rage gets to be too much and the family thinks Kim's lost it when she starts wearing wigs.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family That Plays Together ...
programme.desc: Bruce pressures Kris to signing Brandon to her new music company. Kourtney doesn't appreciate Scott's romantic gesture. Kris tries to get the family to play tennis again.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Man in the Memoir
programme.desc: Kris runs into the man she had an affair with over 20 years ago and wonders if she should arrange another meeting with him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Dominican Republic, Part One
programme.desc: The family's Dominican Republic vacation gets off to a rocky start when Kourtney causes herself, Kim and Scott to miss their flight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Dominican Republic, Part Two
programme.desc: The family vacation continues as Scott starts to feel like an outcast. Kris wakes up with a mysterious medical condition and Kourt must decide what to do about an ultimatum from Scott.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Snaked Out
programme.desc: The kitchen gets steamy when Derek Simcik, named Sexiest Chef, goes up against Philadelphia's haute chef, Sylva Senat. Chopped's Chris Santos and Marc Murphy choose which chef will burn Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Game On
programme.desc: Chef and former football player Eddie Jackson teams up with "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell for a game day bout with Bobby Flay. They recruit Massachusetts native Ashley Gaboriault and award-winning Las Vegas chef Jeff Henderson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Waltz Up A Win
programme.desc: Dancing with the Stars' Derek Hough and food personality Carla Hall taste, tango and decide who to whisk up to compete against Bobby Flay. Doughnut queen Katy Gerdes and French-trained chef Olivier Palazzo face off in this sweet culinary cook-off.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Live From the Food Carpet
programme.desc: It's time for Rachel Ray and Ross Mathews to cheer on competitors K.N. Vinod and Gavin Fine as they duke it out to get in the top spot against Bobby Flay. Only one of them will be able to move on.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Must be Giants
programme.desc: Crab claw king, Andy Saint-Ange, stands against tattooed butcher, Bruce Kalman. Judges Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian will decide which chef gets the chance to take down Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: She's a Lady
programme.desc: The search is on for two ladies to beat Bobby Flay. In this episode it's cooking show host Giovanna Huyke and caterer Jennifer Bajsel. In the judges seats are Alex Guarnaschelli and Katie Lee.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: An International Affair
programme.desc: Ted Allen and Amanda Freitag stop by the arena with one goal in mind: Beat Bobby Flay. Italian-born chef Patrick D'Andrea takes on Canadian chef Rob Feenie for the chance to stare down the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This'll Stick in Your Craw
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Hawaiian chef Jojo Vasquez tangles with Nashville's Brian Riggenbach for the ultimate chance to one-up Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Sunny Anderson and Clinton Kelly are here to make sure no one plays nice.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Belly Up!
programme.desc: Chefs Claire Robinson and Scott Conant bring in meat masters Max Hosey and Ash Fulk to take down Bobby Flay. The competition heats up when Scott reveals his obsession with the winning contender's signature dish.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pretty Little Fryer
programme.desc: "Best Baker in America's" Scott Conant teams up with actress Sasha Pieterse to get the truth and a loss out of Bobby Flay. They get a little help from talented farm-to-table chef Anthony Lo Pinto and seafood maven Franco Robazetti.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Victory
programme.desc: Bobby Flay brings his A-game when Mexican cuisine chef Katy Smith and Denver chef Jose Guerrero show up with talent to spare. The pressure is on for Iron Chef Michael Symon and Valerie Bertinelli to choose their contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blondes Have More Fun
programme.desc: Sara Haines tries to keep the winning streak alive when she teams up with Food Network's Anne Burrell to try to bring Bobby Flay down. Chefs Jonathan Dearden and Scott Drewno go head-to-head for a shot at Bobby's crown.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Use Your Noodle
programme.desc: The chips are all in when world-traveled chef Philippe Haddad meets New York's Chef Melissa O'Donnell. It's up to Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian to place their bets on the chef who they think can beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Cut Above
programme.desc: Clearly someone has some beef to settle when Chefs John Tesar and Terry Sargent step into the arena in the hopes of taking down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Iron Chef Redemption
programme.desc: Ted Allen and actress Debi Mazar welcome two contenders who competed on Iron Chef America. Chef Todd Stein faced Bobby Flay in battle mussels, while chef Paul Virant took on Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fully Baked

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Belly Up!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Victory

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Use Your Noodle

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Cut Above

programme.desc: Liza and Charles heat up, but Liza suspects he's keeping something from her. Millennial gets the scoop on a tell-all from acquitted murderer Audrey Colbert. Kelsey feels undermined by Quinn. Maggie, scarred after Clare's labour, seeks rehabilitation.

programme.title: Younger: An Inside Glob
programme.desc: In the wake of a book loss, Liza and Kelsey shift their focus to an author who is skeptical of Millennials in charge. Kelsey deals with the stress of her new job. Maggie tries a holistic remedy.

programme.title: Younger: Stiff Competition
programme.desc: Liza and Charles use competition to spice up their relationship. Kelsey and Diana question Liza's loyalty. Josh reaps the perks of going viral.

programme.title: Younger: Merger, She Wrote
programme.desc: Liza and Charles attend a microdosing retreat, where Liza is surprised by new friends and familiar faces. Brownyn Madigan finds an unlikely voice in her audio books. Maggie gets hogtied.

programme.title: Younger: Friends With Benefits
programme.desc: Kelsey finds herself at odds with Charles. Liza has a flashback to her old life. Diana attends a family christening with Enzo and meets his ex.

programme.title: Younger: The Debu-taunt
programme.desc: Charles wants to take the next step with Liza. Millennial participates in a Debutante Ball for first-time authors.

programme.title: Younger: Millennial's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Millennial deals with the fallout of the debutante ball. Liza is pulled into a media frenzy, led by a publicity-hungry Quinn Tyler. Maggie dates against type while Kelsey and Zane reset.

programme.title: Younger: It's All About the Money, Honey
programme.desc: Liza is shocked to see an unexpected co-star in her 'Infinitely 21' ad campaign. Kelsey and Charles head to Chicago with a plan. Josh considers his options beyond Inkburg.

programme.title: Younger: Holding Out for a SHero
programme.desc: Millennial is left reeling after another regime change. Kelsey deals with the aftermath of her social media mishap. Liza tries to be polite while letting go of the past. The gang celebrates Diana.

programme.title: Younger: Forever
programme.desc: Liza struggles to balance without Kelsey. Kelsey strategizes with an unlikely ally. Diana and Charles both make moves for the future.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: In Conclusion, Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Wingmom

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce
programme.desc: Christine's former marriage counsellor comes into the gym, leading to some awkwardness between the women. When Christine mentions this to Richard, his cryptic reaction leads her to wonder if it was in the counsellor's interest to encourage their divorce.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Exile on Lame Street

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done
programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Moving Target
programme.desc: Game Wardens beef up patrols for the short pronghorn season. A deer needs to be captured and relocated from an industrial site, and an injured hawk is rushed to a rehabber. Near Port Aransas, Game Wardens check duck hunters on the bay.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Gator Trouble
programme.desc: Warden Sellers and Roraback are in pursuit of illicit hunters, while an abandoned car is found on private property. Later, a group of jetskiers are caught bending the rules, and a team is deployed to wrangle a wild gator.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Nick of Time
programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Gator Trouble
programme.desc: Warden Sellers and Roraback are in pursuit of illicit hunters, while an abandoned car is found on private property. Later, a group of jetskiers are caught bending the rules, and a team is deployed to wrangle a wild gator.

programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Meth and Mischief
programme.desc: The officers deal with several dangerous suspects including a fisherman with a short fuse, and a perp with a history of methamphetamine use and explosives.

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Bear Naked Truth
programme.desc: A recent bear hunt raises suspicion, and Sgt, Jewell catches a couple in a compromising position in their car.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Big Jobs, Little Paws
programme.desc: Four tiny Tibetan spaniels, all boys, are born into a family of watchdogs. An extra large litter of Newfoundland puppies take to the water as they train to be rescue dogs. And a patchwork puppy tries to blend into a family of Retriever mixes.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Kitten Impossible: Roadtrip Rescue
programme.desc: Jackson takes the show on the road, literally. In order to save the lives of kittens from LA shelters, the Cat Daddy high-tails 50 orphan kittens in need of a home all the way to his old stomping grounds of Boulder, Colorado.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Capybara Casanova
programme.desc: Capybara Lily is pregnant and keepers are hoping for a big litter to liven things up in the all-female group. When newborn Henry emerges, he quickly learns to enjoy having the run of the paddock, and the attention of all the females.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wilmer's Tank-errama
programme.desc: Actor and producer Wilmer Valderrama asks the guys to build a tank with multiple angles and sides. Then, a health centre in Grand Rapids, Michigan wants a tank to mimic the city's famous rapids.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Girl Named Gun
programme.desc: After a couple from New Jersey falls in love with a new best friend, the adoption is put on the line when Dr. Kristen discovers a heart murmur. Tia heads out to the swamps to rescue a dog in need of medical attention and is shocked by the diagnosis.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Different Mission
programme.desc: Earl takes the lead in restoring an abandoned Rottweiler to health. A service dog organization from North Carolina reaches out to Villalobos searching for a new dog for their program. M2 goes on her second rescue, taking in an owner surrender.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Madea's Farewell Play
programme.desc: A staged tour of Tyler Perry's final performance as Madea.

programme.title: Movie: Johnson Family Vacation

programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: The Parkers: Til Death Do Us Part, And Make It Soon

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Nightmare on Grace Street
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Rallo both come home early after getting scared at their respective slumber parties, Donna makes them spend the night in a haunted house to prove how brave they really are.

programme.desc: Nikki is thrilled when Professor Oglevee must move in with her after he goes broke.

programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.desc: A woman bought the house she grew up in, which is across the street from Pittsburgh's most-celebrated icon: Mr. Rogers. Leanne and Steve preserve her mother's kitchen and sentimental memories, but they also bring her own aesthetic into her "new" home.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Farmhouse Flips
programme.desc: Luke and Clint get more than they bargained for when they take on a farmhouse that seemed to be in good condition in Boise, Idaho. Meanwhile, Anita and Ken must overcome weather delays to transform a dated '70s ranch into a modern farmhouse in Atlanta.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Renovation Island: When It Rains, It Pours
programme.desc: Bryan begins work on the two bedroom villa and the crew repairs the hotel block roof. A delayed shipment pushes back the construction schedule. And after a major rainstorm, the Baeumlers make a difficult decision about the opening date.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Power Struggle
programme.desc: Progress continues on the villas, but Bryan and Sarah butt heads over priorities. When Bryan has to leave the site for a few days, Sarah is left in charge. Adam and Bryan race the clock to pay their power bill.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Out of Gas
programme.desc: Bryan's headaches continue as he turns his attention to the pool bar. Bryan and Sarah debate design decisions in the common areas. The industrial kitchen is delayed as the team struggles with the shipping timeline. The first villa is completed.

programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: The remnants of a classified military wasteland and the ghostly remains of a remote Kentucky mining town are now forgotten ruins; experts investigate the secrets of these secluded facilities to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: The remnants of a classified military wasteland and the ghostly remains of a remote Kentucky mining town are now forgotten ruins; experts investigate the secrets of these secluded facilities to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Sonic Weapon
programme.desc: American diplomats stationed in Cuba begin to experience a bizarre mixture of noxious neurological symptoms and seem to be under a mysterious attack; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to determine if a sinister, sonic weapon is at play.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Sonic Weapon
programme.desc: American diplomats stationed in Cuba begin to experience a bizarre mixture of noxious neurological symptoms and seem to be under a mysterious attack; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to determine if a sinister, sonic weapon is at play.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Death Relic of Christ
programme.desc: The Shroud of Turin is alleged to be the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ. It could be a total hoax; now, scientists use cutting-edge forensic analysis to finally determine the truth behind this astonishing holy relic.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Antarctic Trail of Doom
programme.desc: The Scott Antarctic Expedition aspired to conquer the South Pole before anyone else, but this great endeavor of exploration never returned; now, newly uncovered evidence suggests this team may have succumbed to something more sinister than harsh elements.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ride With the Devil
programme.desc: 26-year-old car dealer Christopher O'Brien takes a strange man for a test drive and never returns. Did O'Brien's criminal past finally catch up with him? Or is the truth something more sinister?

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: My Name is Denise
programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Killer Prophet
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, CA, 1970: When an entire family is discovered shot and drowned in their own swimming pool, investigators must traipse through psychedelic hippie communes to solve this Mason-style murder.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Candyland
programme.desc: Key Biscayne, FL, 1964: Candy Mossler (40s) finds her multi-millionaire husband, Jacques (69), stabbed to death in their apartment. Detectives are swept into a twisted tale of incest, secret homosexual liaisons, and money, money, money...

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: The Missing: Off the Face of the Earth
programme.desc: 13-year-old Tabitha Tudors walks to her bus stop, but one day she doesn't come home. She never made it on the bus and police can't find her. And then 16-year-old Shemika Cosey vanishes while at a sleepover.

programme.title: The Missing: Out the Door
programme.desc: Jesse Ross goes on a school trip to Chicago, but never returns to his hotel room. He is seen on video, but police find no trace of him. And then Alexis Scott leaves a party in Peoria, Illinois, but police can't track her down.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Caught on Camera and the Mad Driver
programme.desc: A college bound teenage girl disappears from a department store without a trace. When her body is found, the search for her killer grows into a larger cause. Plus, a ride share driver on a shooting spree terrorizes a Michigan city one night in 2016.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Closing Time and Late Breaking Homicide
programme.desc: A soldier disappears after a night out. When she is declared dead a year later without a body, an investigator tries an unconventional tactic to find her and her killer. Plus, a morning news anchor mysteriously vanishes, and her case is still unsolved.

programme.title: Who Killed Jessica Carpenter? A Hometown Homicide Mystery
programme.desc: In the afternoon of August 2000, 17-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. New interviews add shocking details to the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Blood Will Not Rest
programme.desc: A crime caught on tape shows Hasidic landlord Menachem Stark in the fight for his life. When his body is found the next day, the NYPD is on the hunt for his killers - leading them to potentially deadly secrets about the beloved Brooklyn landlord.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: God's Gift to Women
programme.desc: Pastor Nick Hacheney starts a torrid affair with church secretary Sandy behind his wife Dawn's back. But when Sandy starts receiving prophecies from God about the deaths of both their spouses, it triggers a chain of events which ends in murder.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Fear and Loathing in Houston
programme.desc: In April 2008, 39-year-old Houston native and mother of five, Tina DaVilla, runs errands with her 4 month old infant when she's attacked in a parking lot. In the next year, a rash of similar crimes breaks out across the city. Are they related?

programme.title: Disappeared: About a Boy
programme.desc: Eight year old Zachary Bernhardt disappears from his Florida home late at night. Suspicions swirl around his mom, but she denies any involvement and moves away. When another boy goes missing, new theories emerge.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fripp Island Fix-Up
programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories in Maryland
programme.desc: Frequent visitors to the popular beach town of Ocean City, MD, decide to take a big chance and invest in property for their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Overhaul in North Carolina
programme.desc: Audra and Jason have been renting in North Carolina's Outer Banks for years, but they're ready to put their stamp on a house of their own. Their dream renovation includes gutting the kitchen, creating an open floor plan and an updated game room.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: More Cheese, Please
programme.desc: With so many different styles and flavors, cheese is incredibly versatile. Eddie Jackson finds there's no wrong way to go as he heads out on a creamy, tangy, cheesy ride.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best south-of-the-border flavors in the USA, with a combination of spices, fresh ingredients and traditional cooking styles unlike anything else.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lancaster County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates Lancaster County, PA, where farm-to-table dining isn't a trend - it's tradition! Local favorites include pork and sauerkraut, soft pretzels, scrapple, sticky buns and shoofly pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brother, Can You Spare That Jacket

programme.title: Movie: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A woman inherits a house in Vail, where she meets a man and gets a much-needed break.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid

programme.title: Movie: A New Year's Resolution

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A woman accidentally catches a wedding bouquet before her engaged friend. She is then reminded of a family myth that puts her friend’s happiness at stake.

programme.title: The Office

programme.title: The Office: The Target

programme.title: The Office: Lice

programme.title: The Office: Suit Warehouse

programme.title: The Office: Customer Loyalty

programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Throuple

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: New Car
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira feign poverty in an attempt to get a deal on a used car, while David helps Stevie lay her great-aunt to rest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Driving Test
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira become concerned about the future of the motel, while David panics in anticipation of having to re-take his driving test.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Rooms by the Hour
programme.desc: Johnny puts the motel in an awkward position after renting rooms to a morally dubious enterprise, while David helps Moira tape a film audition.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Seven years after being convicted of first-degree murder, new disturbing information comes to light about Jodi Arias and the murder of her ex-boyfriend. Tracy Brown and Donavan Bering reveal details and shocking new information.

programme.title: Movie: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jodi Arias, a seductive aspiring photographer recently found guilty of killing her former lover, Travis Alexander, who was found nude in his home shower with a slit throat, 27 stab wounds and a bullet to the head.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunt for the I-5 Killer
programme.desc: Based on the true story of the year-long hunt for a killer suspected of murdering 14 victims down the I-5 highway corridor through California, Washington and Oregon.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: The Shocking Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: All In
programme.desc: In the season finale, it's a race against mother nature at the Blue Room Cut to capitalize on a short weather window before winter closes Team Turin out of Montana. Overcoming early mechanical setbacks, the team perseveres to a surprising end.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Questions Asked
programme.desc: Fred discovers a promising new section of ground under the old Mayor's house. Parker's co-foreman Mitch is confronted with a family crisis. Rick turns to the King of Klondike to keep his operation running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When mechanic Carl is forced to leave the claim for an emergency surgery, Rick's team bands together to stay on the gold. Fred's crew step up after their loader dies. Tony pays the price for ignoring a long overdue upgrade.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: The $6 Million Cut
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Parker's success lays in the hands of his mechanic, Tony taps out the Megacut and Fred calls on Mitch for help.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Clear Eyes, Full Pans
programme.desc: Rick bets on a new stretch of ground that pays out with a monster nugget. Parker confronts Brennan over a missed opportunity. Tony digs up a relic that could lead him to virgin ground.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Isolation
programme.desc: As the world struggles to get back to business, Dave and his team of miners give an exclusive, self-shot glimpse into their lives in isolation as they escalate the hunt for the ultimate symbol of security: gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Rise of Rick Ness
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of America's favourite new mine boss, Rick Ness. From college football to touring with a rock n roll band, and finally ending up in the Yukon as Parker's right hand man. We see what led Rick to decide to start a claim of his own.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Clear Eyes, Full Pans

programme.desc: The extraordinary life of America's favourite new mine boss, Rick Ness. From college football to touring with a rock n roll band, and finally ending up in the Yukon as Parker's right hand man. We see what led Rick to decide to start a claim of his own.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Secrets in Stone
programme.desc: Josh explores three legendary locations where stone labyrinths hide something incredible, including a vast city carved deep into a canyon in the Jordanian desert and a dark South Pacific cave once used as a kitchen by a cannibal tribe.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Peacock Bass Challenge
programme.desc: The Martin Family is peacock bass fishing.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Drag Boat Destruction
programme.desc: A dragboat breaks apart at 180 miles per hour. An F3 tornado destroys a town. A DC-7 is deliberately crashed. A massive explosion occurs on the roof of a dorm, and a sprint car crashes at 120 miles per hour.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Alaska Pike on the Fly: Redemption
programme.desc: Curtis and crew chase Northern Pike on the fly in Alaska.

programme.desc: Blair fishes for mahi mahi, snapper, and bonefish with the StarBrite crew at Chub Cay, Bahamas.

programme.title: The Next Bite: All About the Hair on the Mississippi River
programme.desc: Chases and Parsons and Brett King fish on Lake Pepin.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Johnny Cash Guitar/Speed Rug
programme.desc: The Gallery 63 team auctions Johnny Cash's autographed guitar, a trading knife made from a jawbone, and a 17th-century chest for treasures. Picker Jon is initiated with the much dreaded Speed Rug.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Snapper Grand Slam
programme.desc: Secrets of Panama City Beach's waters are revealed.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make vodka, once the secret to surviving a Russian winter, and now America's most-consumed spirit. Mark, Digger and Tim judge as distillers design their own stills and mash in their own raw ingredients.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Judges
programme.desc: Tim Smith challenges Mark and Digger to a moonshine-making rematch. Hot stills and hotter heads clash as all three legends face off to see who can bring the best jar of moonshine to the table and win the ultimate bragging rights.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Weight-shaming Victoria
programme.desc: Theresa sees a doctor about ongoing health issues. Victoria is harassed online for gaining weight. Later, she surprises a bachelorette party with a group reading. A mom seeks closure from the death of her 11-year-old daughter in a car accident.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Guess Who?
programme.desc: It's an all-surprise, all-Knock and Shock special! Theresa surprises unsuspecting people at a hotel and a dentist's office. Later Theresa surprises the kidney donor who saved her friend's life after seeing the show last year.

programme.title: Virgin Diaries
programme.desc: Adult virgins reveal the challenges, truths, and anticipations of losing their virginity.

programme.title: Virgin Diaries: Skippy, Lindsey and Karissa
programme.desc: Meet a 34-year-old Mormon virgin, a 32-year-old virgin, and a 29-year-old virgin who is ready to lose it and reveal all.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: More to Love: About Last Night
programme.desc: Yara gives Jovi an ultimatum. Tarik and Hazel's ex causes new issues. Betty invites herself dress shopping. Natalie attempts to move forward. Zied makes new demands. Amira feels pressured to go to Serbia. Ryan's cousin joins Stephanie.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: First Look: Forgive but Never Forget

programme.desc: Scott and a non-profit organization renovate a dilapidated three-bedroom fixer, but several costly surprises could set the project back.

programme.desc: Justin and Ashlee are ready for the challenge of flipping a home that Duke and Keith don't think is salvageable. Lacking contractors and dealing with a squatter, the pair needs Duke and Keith's help to complete this tricky home makeover.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: A small house on a big lot has the team seeing dollar signs, with plans to split the property and build not one, but two houses for an epic payday. When the split goes bust - taking their profits with it.
