programme.desc: In Tulsa, a young woman is brutally gunned down in broad daylight. And Detective Justin Ritter suspects the witnesses know more than they are saying.

programme.title: The First 48: Love Hate/ A Soldier's Life
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a young woman goes on the run when her boyfriend is murdered. In Atlanta, an army veteran is gunned down after helping a homeless man.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A retail store robber gets outsmarted by a store clerk, and a convenience store employee tries to keep a gunman from shooting her. Then, a man is beaten and nearly electrocuted.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: An errant teenager pulls a gun on a convenience store owner who fights him off with a hammer, and a business owner dives through a truck window to thwart a carjacker. Then, a prison librarian is held hostage.

programme.title: Movie: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A conductor and a veteran engineer race against the clock to stop an unmanned freight train before it reaches a city and causes a catastrophe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Ride Along
programme.desc: A detective brings his sister's boyfriend on a 24-hour patrol designed to scare the heck out of him, but things go much farther than planned when the night leads them to a major criminal.

programme.title: Movie: Ride Along

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee
programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Four Meals, One Color Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a meal that can only be one color, and Patty Jenkins helps determine if Murr is a bad husband.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Grins and Giggles
programme.desc: Watch amateur science experiments go wrong. Plus, a road rage clip that will have you rolling.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Worst Days Ever

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Hilarious Antics
programme.desc: Reporters mistake their microphones for food, an intense gamer flips out in more ways than one and find out the top six signs it’s time to break up.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sometimes You Need to Adjust, Part One
programme.desc: Khloé returns to LA to face increasing demands on her time from the family. Scott has to be on his best behavior at a sweet 16 appearance in NYC.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sometimes You Need to Adjust, Part Two
programme.desc: Khloé continues to feel pressure from the family and must decide if she will go to NY for Scott's restaurant opening. The family wonders about Kim's relationship with an old friend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Queer Eyes, Full Hearts
programme.desc: Phil and Claire don't know if they should be happy or concerned that Haley and Andy are spending a lot of time together, however, they soon find things are not what they appear.

programme.title: Modern Family: Three Turkeys
programme.desc: Phil is cooking Thanksgiving dinner this year with Luke as his sous chef, but Claire has no confidence in them and prepares a secret turkey of her own as backup.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night
programme.desc: When Alex tells Phil and Claire she has a boyfriend, they worry they’ve put too much pressure on her and has made up an imaginary boyfriend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day We Almost Died
programme.desc: While driving out to get breakfast, the Dunphys including Manny have a near death experience causing everyone to reevaluate their lives.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Guns
programme.desc: Claire is furious about neighbours Ronnie and Amber's eye-sore of a boat on their front lawn and it soon becomes an all-out war when Phil calls in the 'big guns' as back up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Rash Decisions
programme.desc: Phil is starting to feel the teenage cold shoulder from Luke, and with Andy hanging around a lot recently as his apprentice, he easily steps in as his new right hand man.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: After a long reunion weekend with Phil's old cheer buddies, Claire jumps at the chance to snag the only first-class seat left on the return flight home, leaving Phil in coach. Both have completely opposite experiences to what they were expecting.

programme.title: Modern Family: Connection Lost
programme.desc: Claire's computer becomes the hub of all the family's activities when she gets stuck at the airport and is desperate to reach Haley after a big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!
programme.desc: A peeping-Tom in the neighbourhood keeps using a drone to spy on Gloria sun-bathing, so Phil, Luke and Manny make it their mission to take it down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break
programme.desc: Claire does some spring cleaning while Phil struggles with not being a spring chicken when Luke starts outperforming him. Haley takes Alex to a music festival to take her mind off college. Gloria and Jay challenge one another to give up soaps and cigars.

programme.title: She's the Boss: Butler With Benefits
programme.desc: Nicole stresses about Krissy going to college and Eddie learns how to be professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Affairs of the Everhart
programme.desc: While Bruce finds a golf buddy in supermodel Angie Everhart Kris wonders if she should call up an old 'buddy' of her own. Rob fights with Khloe when he moves back in with her and Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: When Kris can't prove her innocence to Bruce the kids force the couple to work out their issues. Kim makes Lamar go the dentist and Rob fears he's losing his hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mothers and Daughters
programme.desc: The girls urge Kris to take a trip to San Diego to see her sick mother. Kourt looks into water birth and Bruce checks into a sleep clinic to get his night-time ticks worked out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Tales From the Kardashian Krypt
programme.desc: Kris takes estate planning to another level when she starts to arrange her funeral. Kim discovers that Khloe has been chosen as her nephew's guardian.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at the new series 'For Real: The Story of Reality TV'.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kardashian Therapy, Part One
programme.desc: Oprah comes to the house to interview the family. Kim's desire to explore life as an individual threatens her sisters. Rob breaks down during a family therapy session.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kardashian Therapy, Part Two
programme.desc: Kim tries to work out her issues with her sisters while Rob tries to find his own voice. Kendall & Kylie ask Kris to let them be home schooled. Kim joins Khloe & Lamar on a trip to Queens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cuts Both Ways
programme.desc: Tired of Kourt making all the decisions, Scott considers a vasectomy. Kris goes in for surgery to replace her breast implants and Kim asks Khloe to go with her to a fertility clinic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Baby, Baby, Baby
programme.desc: As the family prepares to welcome Kourt's new baby into the world, Khloe looks into why she can't conceive and Kim starts the process to freeze her eggs.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Welcome Back to Miami
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe have major concerns for Kourtney when she arrives in Miami without Scott. Meanwhile, Khloe wants Kim to admit that her divorce is troubling her.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Secrets
programme.desc: After hearing that her fertility is comparable to a fifty-year old, Kim takes her frustrations out on Kourtney. Meanwhile, Scott's plan to race cars doesn't sit well with Kourtney.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Lez-B-Honest
programme.desc: Scott learns about the lesbian scene in Miami. Meanwhile, Kim has fun stealing Kourtney's breast milk to help treat her psoriasis.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Dragon Me Down
programme.desc: Kim invites the Kardashian family to Miami to compete in the annual Dragon Boat Race. Kourtney realizes that her sister-in-law might be pregnant and Scott can't handle Bruce's overly competitive ways.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: 2 Klose 4 Komfort
programme.desc: Kourtney tells Kim she wants to leave the hotel and find a house, but each of their demands makes house hunting difficult. Meanwhile, Scott gets overly friendly with Khloe and the sisters help Rob with a bad breakup.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Bitch Slapped
programme.desc: Kourtney takes things too far when Jonathan takes Kim's side during an argument. Khloe's love for Cuban coffee puts her in a crazy situation and Kim finds out she has a life changing allergy.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: We'll Always Have Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney invites Scott to Paris to reignite their relationship, but Scott doesn't notice the effort she's making. Kim's tries to repair Jonathan and Simon's friendship, but it blows up in her face.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Miami Vices
programme.desc: Kim takes her love of detective work to another level when she works with a private eye. Scott's eye problems lead to a new fashion accessory and Kourtney's post pregnancy weight gain starts to get to her.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Up New Orleans
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He rolls into a legit butcher shop with a funky take on the Big Easy's comfort food flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hot Meat and Cool Veg
programme.desc: Modesto, Calif. has Portuguese sausage and lamb burgers. Oakland has a vegan joint with okra gumbo. Also, wings and pork rinds in Islamorada, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub and More
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the real deal in bar foods and some Salvadorian classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together in Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Joints
programme.desc: Guy visits a St. Louis tavern for German spaetzle, and Virginia for calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos
programme.desc: In New York's Lower East Side, Guy is pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings to pig ears.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Smothered and Covered
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is covering all things smothered, starting with some mole sauce masters in Salt Lake City. Then, in Florida, a diner is dishing out down-home comfort food like biscuits and gravy, and a joint in Reno, NV, is servin' up sweetbreads in style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Best in Class
programme.desc: Ina's sharing best in class dishes with the volume turned right up.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Easy Does It
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian shares his simple salmon stir fry cheat sheet. The hosts test kitchen tools to see if they really save you time, and chef Jordan Andino stops by to share his easy, flavor-packed chicken adobo tacos.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Baby Shower Brunch
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts an elegant baby shower and brunch for her young Aunt Carolyna, who is like a little sister to Giada.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Go Green or Go Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a St. Patrick's Day party, offering her spin on traditional Irish dishes. Guests will feast on hearty Lamb and Red Wine Stew, Mashed Yukon Gold Potatoes with Savoy Cabbage, plus a Smoked Salmon 'Crudo' with creamy cucumbers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 16-Minute Chicken Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making 16-minute chicken dinners in a race against time. She starts with chicken fajita pasta, followed by honey plum soy stir fry. Cutlets make an amazing spicy chicken sandwich, and there's a shortcut in the green goddess chicken salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Easy Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree has four awesome, easy dinners on the menu at the ranch. She shares Cajun surf and turf pasta and a fast pineapple chicken stir-fry. Then, Ree makes shortcut broccoli and tomato flatbread pizzas and a street corn quesadilla.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Classics Worth Cooking
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are breaking down the classic dishes that every home cook can master in their own kitchens. There's no-fail whole roasted chicken, salad nicoise, a t-bone steak with easy bearnaise sauce and chili orange chocolate souffle for dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Favorite Sunday Suppers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends make their lazy-day favorites. Eric Greenspan cooks chicken schnitzel, Antonia Lofaso makes seafood fra diavolo, Marc Murphy bakes his four-cheese spaghetti, and Crista Luedtke shares her classic boon brussels sprouts.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sweet and Spicy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't love candy, so when his chef friends visit the ranch for Halloween, they know to mix heat with the sweet. Amanda Freitag starts off the meal with a red hot-blood orange margarita made with spicy cinnamon syrup.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Tournament Begins
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the greatest chefs in the world to the most-intense culinary competition ever held. The chefs are ranked, and the first-round battle lines are drawn, setting up epic clashes between two best friends.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Round One Continues
programme.desc: Guy Fieri presides over tense battles as six new chefs fight desperately to advance out of the first round of the Tournament of Champions. Friendships are tested, reputations are on the line, and rivals go head-to-head in a nail-biting clash for the ages.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Guy at Home Watch Party: Final Eight Revealed
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri takes the Tournament of Champions to the next level as an intense second round begins. Pressure mounts for the final eight chefs as the competition and judging get tougher, and a shocking result makes it clear that no chef is safe.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Baio and Switch

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Christine volunteers to help out at Richie's spring carnival and while there, she runs into the mean moms, who are clucking over the attractive father of a new student at Westbridge. Christine is excited to learn that the hot dad is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Passion of the Christine
programme.desc: Since New Christine broke up with Richard, he's been spending a lot of time at Christine's house, leading Ritchie to believe that his parents are back together. Richard suggests that they give their relationship another try.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe
programme.desc: Richard tells Christine that the reason he has good luck with women is that he 'says yes to life.' When Christine meets a good-looking man after paying a visit to New Christine, she breaks out of her mold and says yes when he asks her out to dinner.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes
programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: Roseanne: Playing With Matches
programme.desc: Roseanne's mom makes a new friend, Jake, at the retirement home. Now, Roseanne's playing Cupid and Jackie's planning their wedding. With special guest Red Buttons.

programme.title: Roseanne: Promises, Promises
programme.desc: Darlene and David's youthful romance takes a complicated turn when she surprises him by renting a hotel room after their senior prom. Meanwhile, Roseanne and Dan decide to invest in a friend's business scheme.

programme.title: Roseanne: Glengarry, Glen Rosey
programme.desc: The old house Roseanne and Dan fixed up to sell languishes on the market after Roger abruptly skips town.

programme.title: Roseanne: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: Darlene must choose between David and her future when she gets accepted to a college for the arts in Chicago. Roseanne gets a visit from the new health inspector: her old boss Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Daughters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne decide to let Darlene go to art school in Chicago, but will Darlene leave David to pursue her future? Meanwhile, at a birthday party, 'Seven Minutes in Heaven' turns DJ into a new man.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two Down, One to Go
programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Mommy's Curse
programme.desc: Jackie agrees to date Dan's co-worker, Fred, if Roseanne agrees to fire Bev from working at the diner. The plan backfires when Bev plans to sell her share of the diner to Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.title: Roseanne: A Stash From the Past
programme.desc: The discovery of a mysterious cache of marijuana in the Conner household sparks a smoky chain of events -- leading Roseanne and Dan to the humorous realization that their days of 'rebellious youth' are over.

programme.title: Roseanne: Be My Baby
programme.desc: Roseanne wants another baby, but to everyone's surprise, Jackie breaks the news about being in a 'family way,' sending Roseanne into a swirl of activity preparing for Jackie's maternity.

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween V
programme.desc: Dan pulls a Halloween trick on Nancy to convince her of his friendship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Homeward Bound
programme.desc: Roseanne is suspicious when David moves out of the Conner household upon Darlene's impromptu visit. DJ experiences puberty.

programme.title: Roseanne: Guilt by Imagination
programme.desc: Dan's old girlfriend drops by for a lunch date. Roseanne imagines some romantic fantasies of her own with Fabio.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.desc: Paul Gigot, editor of the 'Wall Street Journal's' editorial page, moderates and hosts this weekly news and discussion program. He is joined by deputy editorial page editor Daniel Henninger and Pulitzer Prize winner Dorothy Rabinowitz.

programme.title: River Monsters: Piranha
programme.desc: Piranha viciously mutilated a coach full of passengers when it crashed into the Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Africa's Rift Valley to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters the first fishermen faced; it's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: Locals call it the lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole. Jeremy has hunted the legendary Amazon giant for years and this time he's not coming back without the single colossal specimen.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Predators Rising: Secrets of the Nazi Sub
programme.desc: When a toxic cargo Nazi submarine sinks, Jeremy reveals its top-secret mission and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe. Later, he uses cutting-edge technology to help vindicate early NASA astronauts from a tarnished reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Predators Rising: Secrets of the Nazi Sub
programme.desc: When a toxic cargo Nazi submarine sinks, Jeremy reveals its top-secret mission and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe. Later, he uses cutting-edge technology to help vindicate early NASA astronauts from a tarnished reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters: Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to discover the true river monster of South America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Bacon and Tomato's Big Adventure
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents: black-blotched Fantail stingray siblings, Bacon and Tomato, and Shelley the shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: Movie: Creed
programme.desc: When the son of his late friend decides to enter the world of boxing, Former Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa volunteers to serve as his trainer and mentor.

programme.title: Movie: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman has a happy life and a strong marriage, but finds herself drawn to another man. What begins as a temptation becomes an addiction, as her indiscretions lead her down a path that could cost her more than just her marriage.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Oval: Wicked Things
programme.desc: Victoria can't believe what she finds hidden in The White House. The spark in Ellie and Allan's relationship is completely gone. A tragedy occurs at thirty-five thousand feet.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: When it's Midnight
programme.desc: Karen becomes very upset with Andi. Fatima threatens an attorney at the firm. Maurice walks into his home and makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Ruthless: The Precious Jewel

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Sex and the Biddy

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Die Semi-Hard
programme.desc: To help pass the time while posing in a holiday nativity scene, Cleveland tells his family one of his favourite holiday stories, 'Die Hard.'

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Y Tu Jr. Tambien
programme.desc: When Jr. starts dating a very attractive young lady, Cleveland becomes green with envy and suspicious of her motives.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Accidental Therapist
programme.desc: Nikki blackmails Oglevee into attending therapy; T and Stevie snap celebrity photos.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Mack Is Like Wo
programme.desc: The professor lands on a dating game show only to discover that Nikki is a potential date.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kimmie Has Two Moms
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki enter a talk show's best-mother contest, but after they win Nikki falls ill.

programme.title: The Parkers: I Never Rapped for My Father
programme.desc: Andell's cousin dates Oglevee without telling Nikki; T's dad wants into Freestyle Unity.

programme.title: The Parkers: Foul Ball
programme.desc: Stevie, Nikki and Kim enlist a ringer to win an annual softball game against a rival team.

programme.title: The Parkers: Cheaters Never Prosper

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It's a Wonderful Lie

programme.title: Martin: Headin' for Trouble
programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Movie: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman has a happy life and a strong marriage, but finds herself drawn to another man. What begins as a temptation becomes an addiction, as her indiscretions lead her down a path that could cost her more than just her marriage.

programme.desc: An artist wants to raise her teenage son in the small town near their friends and family. With a budget of up to $200,000, her wish list includes plenty of room to welcome visitors and a dedicated art studio.

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House
programme.desc: A minister and his wife are offered a clergy house, but the home is cramped with their family of seven. Ben and Erin share their vision for updating the space and show the couple the Collins House to give them a second, larger option.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits
programme.desc: A Canadian couple looks to purchase a vacation home that will one day become their retirement home. With an all-in budget of $140,000, Ben and Erin show them two Craftsman cottages.

programme.desc: A Wisconsin mom is ready to ditch her tiny apartment after winning $500,000 on a scratch off. Now that her kids have left the nest, this house hunt is all about her and she asks David Bromstad to find a home with space to entertain friends and family.

programme.desc: Dawayne and Joi purchased their home with a dream office that was a perfect place for Dawayne to run his business. Now Joi, Dawayne, their two kids and his mother share the space while coping with daily visits from his siblings, who live very close.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Kitchen Catastrophe
programme.desc: Chris and Maria moved into their home with two kids, but now with four children, the house and its tiny kitchen feel cramped and cluttered. Maria wants a home with a gourmet kitchen closer to her work to shorten her commute.

programme.desc: Grandma Janice shows up to present Liv with an award, but something just doesn't feel right. Meanwhile, Joey invites three girls over to watch the 'Lover's Comet.'

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Prom-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv realizes she has a crush on Holden, but Andie asks him to prom before Liv can. With Diggie away, Karen arranges for Rooney cousin Craig to take Maddie to prom.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Princesses and Prizes
programme.desc: Austin agrees to be auctioned off on a date in order to help raise money for Ally's charity.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Cupids & Cuties
programme.desc: Trish is nervous about an upcoming visit from a boy she has a crush on and does not act like herself when he takes her out on their first date.

programme.title: Jessie: Evil Times Two
programme.desc: Jesse suspects Nanny Agatha's twin sister of trying to steal her job and catch Tony's eye. Emma has a giant zit on her nose.

programme.title: Jessie: Gotcha Day
programme.desc: The Ross Family puts Jessie in charge of decorations for a party celebrating the anniversary of Zuri's adoption. Meanwhile, Ravi finds out some surprising news about his own adoption.

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Jessie is tasked with ungluing Mrs. Chesterfield's hands from her head, while Ravi attempts to uncover who switched Mrs. Chesterfield's hair gel with glue.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Ikari Gozen
programme.desc: Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in the giant armour that forms her body.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timetagger
programme.desc: Ladybug and Cat Noir face Timetagger, a supervillain who has come from the future to seize their Miraculous. The future of Paris lies in their hands!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Bleeped/ Sellouts
programme.desc: Cricket is amused by a new socially unacceptable word in his big city world and tempts fate by repeating it. Then, the Greens try new methods to improve sales at their produce stand.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Party Crasher
programme.desc: Because of a misunderstanding, a fan of Adrien's gets akumatized into Party Crasher. Convinced that his star has made a fool of him, he is determined to get revenge.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer 2
programme.desc: Manon becomes The Puppeteer again. And she is determined to have fun like never before in a unique playground: the wax museum.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs: Long Time Gone

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs: If I Could Turn Back Time
programme.desc: Harper and Griffin escape after being detained by the police and find young Jess, who reveals new details about her relationship with Savannah.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Raucous Science
programme.desc: Lou signs up for a chemistry class to finish her college degree and is surprised to discover that Matteo is her professor. Meanwhile, Finn learns he has a new little sister on the way.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Baton-man Begins
programme.desc: While visiting Finn in the hospital, Noah develops a crush on Destiny's new friend. Meanwhile, Ava attempts to interest Finn in reading.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Little Surprise
programme.desc: Nia, Booker, Levi and Chelsea secretly plan a big surprise party for Raven's birthday. Unbeknownst to her family, Raven accepted a job driving singing-sensation Sunrise Mahoney around and is sworn to secrecy.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Tesscue Me

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Snapped: Lynette Pontius
programme.desc: Lynette flees the country when her ex-boyfriend is shot during a custody dispute, but finding her is only one of the challenges investigators have to face.

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Stoldt
programme.desc: A missing person case goes cold until a nervous breakdown leads to a confession.

programme.title: Snapped: Monique Kitts
programme.desc: A successful daycare owner finds her husband dead after an alleged home invasion, but police discover a shocking double life and a murder plan full of possible accomplices.

programme.title: Snapped: Shelia Eddy
programme.desc: A family searches for a missing teen only to find out she’s been betrayed by her closest friends.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Fatal Ambition
programme.desc: A hard-working young woman is discovered stabbed at the side of a road, leading police on a tireless investigation for 10 years to unveil a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: An in depth look at the life and crimes of master manipulator, and monster, Drew Peterson. Peterson is currently serving time for the murder of his third wife while the search for his fourth wife Stacy continues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Cold Cases
programme.desc: Two cases gone cold leave the victim’s families wondering if they will ever see justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Giselle Esteban
programme.desc: A pretty, young nursing student disappears and the investigation uncovers a deadly fued with her former best friend.

programme.title: Snapped: Ghazal Mansury
programme.desc: When a 79-year old woman goes missing, her daughter blames dementia but the rest of her family suspects someone much closer to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Fowler
programme.desc: A church congregation is shocked when a deadly home invasion turns out to be part of a scandalous web of sex, lies and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: Three suspects were arrested for the murder of Dar Foley, but although a trial and conviction occurred, the news that came in after the verdict was shocking.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Triangle
programme.desc: Archie McFarland was stabbed to death in the driveway of his home, and his murder remained unsolved for more than 25 years until a new detective revisited the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Connection
programme.desc: They were bright young women out for a little fun with their friends. Kenya Monge and Lydia Tillman didn't know each other but they would be forever related, both falling prey to a smooth-talking stranger with a terrifying secret.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: The Silent Witness
programme.desc: Detectives in Florida are working to identify the body of a young woman found floating in a river. The sheer brutality of the murder and endless pool of potential suspects leaves investigators puzzled until they uncover a silent witness to the crime.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The body of Kathy Blair, a choir director, is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The gruesome crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a depraved killer.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: The Buried Truth
programme.desc: After the battered body of a young woman is found dumped at a landfill in Lubbock, Texas detectives race to collect evidence hidden in acres of trash. The elusive killer's attempt to bury the truth might hold the key to unlocking the mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Loretta Burroughs
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads to a disturbing discovery years later deep in his wife’s closet.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Blanton

programme.title: Snapped: Diane Borchardt

programme.title: Movie: Jason Bourne

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fatzcarraldo

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Cad and the Hat
programme.desc: When Bart betrays Lisa, he has to deal with his guilt literally. Meanwhile, Springfield is in awe when Homer is revealed to be a chess savant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kamp Krustier
programme.desc: When Bart and Lisa return home abruptly after a traumatic incident at Kamp Krustier, they put an end to Homer and Marge's romantic encounters. Without sex to distract him, Homer becomes a more productive worker and caring husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Father's Watch
programme.desc: Worried that Bart is destined for failure, Marge turns to a series of parenting 'experts' for advice. Homer decides to cash in on one expert’s advice by opening up a trophy store in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Looking for Mr. Goodbart
programme.desc: Bart gets in trouble on Grandparents Day at school and is forced to hang out with Skinner's mother as punishment. After spending time with various grandmas in the neighbourhood, he learns the benefits of hanging out with the elderly.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moho House
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attempt to work on their marriage, not knowing that Mr. Burns and Nigel have a bet on whether Nigel can break them apart. With the successful, albeit unconventional, help of Moe, the couple gets back their mojo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Serfsons
programme.desc: In a magical medieval world, Marge's mother is turned into an Ice Walker and the only way for Homer to afford the cure is to force Lisa to use illegal magic. When the King discovers this, he kidnaps Lisa, and Homer must lead a feudal uprising to save her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Splendor

programme.title: Family Guy: Christmas Is Coming
programme.desc: When Meg takes Stewie to the mall to meet Santa, she has a surprising response. Meanwhile, Stewie is entirely scarred from the same experience and Brian tries to help him process.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: The Masked Intruders
programme.desc: When Arnold and Tammi Cuyler invite Tammi's first cousin Chasity into their home to help with their children, Tammi starts to suspect her husband and cousin are fooling around. The Cuyler's marriage ends in divorce, and one very unexpected death.

programme.title: The Deadly Type With Candice DeLong: discovery+ Exclusive Preview: The Transformer
programme.desc: One likes to think personalities don't change. Yet people often describe their partners as 'not the person I married.' Candice explores how certain circumstances emotional stress, financial hardship, drugs, and alcohol can unlock the killer within.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Homicide City: High Rise Murder
programme.desc: When Helen Bernstein is found dead in the bathtub of her Chestnut Hill high-rise, she appears to have died of natural causes.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A couple of opposites come together to form a power couple, but, they soon learn that their money can't buy love and happiness, it can only buy death.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: Betrayed: Flirting With Death
programme.desc: Single mom Norma Rodriguez thinks she's found Prince Charming – until she's confronted by his crazy ex. On top of that, her best friend asks her to hide a deadly secret, and a co-worker reveals a shady past… all leading to her brutal murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Lone Star Mystery
programme.desc: The crime rate in rural Royse City, TX is almost non-existent. So when quiet couple Dennis and Norma Woodruff is found murdered in their own home, it sends shock waves through town. As police investigate, it seems the killings...are a family affair.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the country music capital Nashville, where chefs are playing meaty tunes. At Urban Grub, Chef Edgar Pendley fans the flames in a massive 18-foot-tall hearth and hangs a wall of house-made andouille sausages and pork ribs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Exoskeleton vs. Grandma
programme.desc: When Davenport's prized invention, a super strength and laser empowered exoskeleton suit, malfunctions, Leo takes it upon himself to fix it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Concert in a Can
programme.desc: The Lab Rats befriend a new kid in school named Marcus, who takes to the whole gang very quickly, except for Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spy Fly
programme.desc: Leo turns to Bree for help after he mistakenly unleashes a swarm of robotic flies on the school. Adam and Chase turn their class assignment into a destructive competition.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Speed Trapped
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase sneak out to meet Marcus in Davenport's new self-driving sports car.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Rats Strike Back
programme.desc: The Lab Rats confide in Leo their frustrations at having to constantly train and their desire to do normal teenage things. Leo explains the concept of going on strike so they face off against Davenport, who calls their strike bluff and raises the stakes.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Parallel Universe

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spike's Got Talent

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Haunting of Mission Creek High

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Listen To Your Bey's Voice!
Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.
